name: Pearlridge Farmers Market
tagline: Saturday morning market in Aiea drawing local families — strong Filipino food stalls and the best prices on tropical fruit.
bestTime: Arrive early for the best tropical fruit selection
talkStory: This Saturday morning market at Pearlridge Center serves the local Filipino, Japanese, and mixed-plate families of Central Oahu who have no interest in driving to KCC. The Filipino prepared food stalls are particularly outstanding -- lumpia, pancit, and lechon kawali that rival any restaurant. Produce prices are noticeably lower than town-side markets because vendors here compete for budget-conscious local families, not tourists. One of Oahu's most authentically local market experiences.
